report.summary: Cycle-close v8: 20 learn guides promoted today (batches 1-9), publish queue nearly drained (4 remaining). TS errors unchanged at 46 across 3 files. 746 uncommitted files, 7 days since last deploy — P0 deploy risk persists.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: TYPESCRIPT: 46 errors across 3 files (unchanged from v7). Affected: crypto-arbitrage-strategies-guide-2026/page.tsx, crypto-index-funds-guide-2026/page.tsx, structured-data.examples.ts.
PAGE AUDIT: 467 unique published slugs, 364 have page.tsx (78%), 103 missing (served via dynamic catch-all routes or absent). No change from v7.
TODAY'S PAGES: 20 learn guides promoted across 9 batches (bitcoin-mining, zk-coprocessors, berachain, celestia, depin, scroll-zkevm, polymarket, etc).
KNOWN 404s: /compare/exchanges and /trading still missing page.tsx — carried over.
LIVE VERIFICATION: Egress to degen0x.com blocked from this environment — cannot verify HTTP 200s on production.
BUILD GATE: 46 TS errors are non-blocking for Next.js production build. No new regressions this cycle.

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: ALL 6 CORE API ROUTE FILES PRESENT: fear-greed, trending, market-metrics, market-dominance, prices, defi-yields — all have route.ts locally.
BONUS ROUTES: 7 additional API routes found (cache-stats, health, news-rss, newsletter, notifications, standup-email, subscribe).
CACHE TTLs VERIFIED: fear-greed 10min, trending 5min, market-metrics 60s, market-dominance 5min, prices 60s, defi-yields configurable. All use stale-while-revalidate at 2x.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: /api/market-metrics route.ts exists locally but was never committed — still 404 in production.
CARRY-OVER [P1]: Rate limiting only on /api/health and /api/cache-stats. 6 core data routes remain unprotected.
LIVE HEALTH CHECK: Cannot verify — egress blocked from this environment.

sections.title: DevOps
items: LAST DEPLOY: Commit e999560 (Mar 17) — 7 days since last deploy. Zero commits since.
UNCOMMITTED WORK: 746 items (698 untracked, 48 modified). Up from 740 in v7 — delta is new report/community files.
CRITICAL FILES UNCOMMITTED: middleware.ts (+2 lines), published-pages.ts (+146 lines). Core routing and indexing config not in production.
DEPLOY RISK [P0]: 7 days and 746 files uncommitted. All pages promoted since Mar 17 exist only locally.
SITE STATUS: Cannot verify from this environment (egress blocked).

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: 20 learn guides promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES across 9 batches (Mar 24 builds).
PUBLISH QUEUE: Nearly drained — 4 pages remaining (sei-network, advanced-staking, crypto-tax-loss-harvesting, cold-storage-seed-phrase).
TOTAL PUBLISHED: 467 unique slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES (up from ~460 at start of today).
ACTION REQUIRED [P0]: Commit and deploy immediately. 7 days of drift between local and production is critical risk. All 20+ pages promoted since Mar 17 are invisible to Google.
ACTION REQUIRED [P1]: Fix 46 TS errors in 3 files (mainly unescaped > chars in JSX and structured-data.examples.ts syntax issues).
ACTION REQUIRED [P1]: Commit /api/market-metrics to fix production 404.
CARRY-OVER: Wire rate limiters to 6 core API routes, build /trading page, drain final 4 queue items, add JSON-LD to pages missing structured data.
